hooks.command: $sounds = @('file:///C:/sounds/Rocky_A.mp3', 'file:///C:/sounds/Rocky_B.mp3'); $uri = $sounds | Get-Random; Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; $mp = New-Object system.windows.media.mediaplayer; $mp.open([uri]$uri); $mp.Volume = 1.0; $mp.Play(); Start-Sleep 4

$sounds = @('file:///C:/sounds/Rocky_A.mp3', 'file:///C:/sounds/Rocky_B.mp3'); $uri = $sounds | Get-Random; Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; $mp = New-Object system.windows.media.mediaplayer; $mp.open([uri]$uri); $mp.Volume = 1.0; $mp.Play(); Start-Sleep 4
